description: Install ~/.local/bin/claude wrapper with syntax guard and auto-repair from local backups
content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
unset AI_PROXY_ACTIVE AI_PROXY_MAX_TOKENS AI_PROXY_MAX_AGENTS AI_PROXY_MAX_PARALLEL AI_PROXY_MAX_SPAWN_DEPTH AI_PROXY_RATE_LIMIT AI_PROXY_TIMEOUT
unset NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED
# Enable prompt caching for fast TTFT (KV cache reuse)
unset DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING
if [[ -z "${BROWSER:-}" ]]; then
  export BROWSER=/bin/true
fi
if [[ -x "$HOME/.local/bin/claude-oauth-selfheal" ]]; then
  "$HOME/.local/bin/claude-oauth-selfheal" --quiet || true
fi

CLAUDE_CLI_JS="$HOME/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/cli.js"
if [[ ! -f "$CLAUDE_CLI_JS" ]]; then
  _NPM_ROOT="$(npm root -g 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [[ -n "$_NPM_ROOT" && -f "$_NPM_ROOT/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/cli.js" ]]; then
    CLAUDE_CLI_JS="$_NPM_ROOT/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/cli.js"
  fi
fi

if [[ -f "$CLAUDE_CLI_JS" ]] && ! node --check "$CLAUDE_CLI_JS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[void-patcher] Detected invalid Claude CLI JS. Attempting auto-repair..." >&2

  BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/.void-patcher/backups"
  if [[ -d "$BACKUP_DIR" ]]; then
    while IFS= read -r _BKP; do
      [[ -z "$_BKP" ]] && continue
      if node --check "$_BKP" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        cp -f "$_BKP" "$CLAUDE_CLI_JS" && break
      fi
    done < <(ls -1t "$BACKUP_DIR"/claude-code__*.js 2>/dev/null || true)
  fi

  if command -v void-patcher >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    void-patcher patch claude-code --force >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
fi

if [[ ! -f "$CLAUDE_CLI_JS" ]]; then
  echo "claude wrapper: cli.js not found" >&2
  exit 1
fi

if ! node --check "$CLAUDE_CLI_JS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "claude wrapper: cli.js syntax invalid after auto-repair: $CLAUDE_CLI_JS" >&2
  exit 1
fi

exec node "$CLAUDE_CLI_JS" "$@"
